Notes: * Championship game of Centenary College Tip-Off Tournament
* Most Valuable Player: Kiana Briggs, NJCU; All-Tournament Team: Sharaunda
Fiedtkou. NJCU wins first tournament since 2005-06 St. Mary's College Tourn.
* NJCU leads all-time series, 7-1. NJCU is 2-0 for first time since 2005-06.
Game.Officials: Jeffrey O'Brien,  Sabrina Isom,  Dan DePasquale
